form.formComment: Third-up today and won third-up previously. Comes off a 36 day let-up. Resuming favourite; raced right near the speed and boxed on; won by 0.8 len at this track January 13 over 1020m defeating Fidelius with 57kg at $23. Second-up 4th of 10 at this track on March 4 over 1000m, 4 len behind Gaeli carrying 57.5kg at $5. Can bounce back.

form.formComment: Racing well recently. Comes here off a 35-day let-up. Last start favourite; won by 1.0 len at Lingfield All Weather March 5 over 1000m defeating The Thames Boatman carrying 61kg at $1.90. The race before that 2nd of 9 at Chelmsford on February 21 over 1000m, 1.5 len behind Atomic Force carrying 53kg at $6.50. Draws well and another big run is in store.

The race before that 2nd of 9 at Chelmsford on February 21 over 1000m, 1.5 len behind Atomic Force carrying 53kg at $6.50. Draws well and another big run is in store.

form.formComment: Resuming. Finished off last campaign 13th of 20 at York August 20 over 1100m, 8 len behind Trefor carrying 56.5kg at $41. On debut second last of 12 at Kempton Park All Weather May 5 over 1200m, 18 len behind Crestofdistinction carrying 60kg at $51. Marginal prospect.

form.formComment: Gelding back from a spell of three-and-a-half months. Has placed previously first up from a break. Finished off last preparation fourth of 9 at this track January 4 over 1000m, 1.0 len behind Existent with 61kg at $3.50. First up last campaign second in a small field at Doncaster August 16 over 1000m, a neck behind Grandlad with 62.5kg at $3.10. Great chance.

form.formComment: Most recently 8th of 12 at Newcastle All Weather on March 27 over 1000m, 2.75 len behind Pixie Diva with 61kg at $12. Before that 4th in a small field at this track on March 14 over 1000m, 1.5 len behind Sports Coach with 61kg at $3.30. In the mix.

form.formComment: Gelding returning from a spell and has won previously when first up. Finished off last preparation fourth of 10 at Great Yarmouth October 21 over 1000m, 2.5 len behind Sturlasson carrying 61kg at $10. Previously first up; fifth of 9 at Ripon April 17 over 1200m, 4.5 len behind American Style carrying 59.5kg at $8.50. Should be right about the mark again.

form.formComment: Returns from a 58-day let-up. Most recently ran last in a small field at Lingfield All Weather on February 10 over 1000m, 5.5 len behind Fidelius with 58.5kg at $10. Before that 5th of 8 at Lingfield All Weather on January 31 over 1000m, 2 len behind Atomic Force with 58kg at $7.50. Will be harder to beat this time.
